source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ FDA/1. FDA 510k final 수정사항 반영한 최종 문서/011_Clinical Report.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Clinical comparison report evaluating HAD1717MC radiographic images against S4343-W images across 30 plain radiographic views.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports clinical image quality comparison for the HAD1717MC objective device using radiologist evaluation and DICOM 3.0 image data.
keyPoints: Objective Device is identified as HAD1717MC by H&Abyz Co., Ltd.
Comparative Equipment is identified as S4343-W made by Samsung Mobile Display Co., Ltd.
One radiologist, Dr. Jung Man Lee, evaluated images using grades S, A, B, and C.
The report states a total average score of 3.45 for HAD1717MC and 3.28 for S4343-W.
The conclusion states HAD1717MC images are comparable or slightly better than S4343-W images.

evidence.claim: The document is titled Clinical Report.
The document file number is A-CD-2.
The document revision is Rev. No 0.
HAD1717MC is identified as the objective device by H&Abyz Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Objective Device : HAD1717MC by H&Abyz Co., Ltd.(On the Right)

evidence.claim: S4343-W is identified as comparative equipment made by Samsung Mobile Display Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Comparative Equipment : S4343-W made by Samsung Mobile Display Co., Ltd. (On the Left)

evidence.claim: The report uses DICOM 3.0 data for downloading and analysis.
evidence.evidenceText: output data for communications standard DICOM 3.0 is used to format the data for downloading and analysis.

evidence.claim: One radiologist evaluated the images using manufacturer-prepared criteria and grades S, A, B, C.
evidence.evidenceText: Method: for each of image, one radiologist evaluated the images according to the criteria that is prepared by manufacturer. Check grade: S, A, B, C

evidence.claim: The evaluating radiologist is Dr. Jung Man Lee.
evidence.evidenceText: The number of radiologist: 1 (Dr. Jung Man Lee)

evidence.claim: The report evaluated one case for each type.
evidence.evidenceText: The number of cases of each type: just one case is compared respectively.

evidence.claim: The report lists 30 radiographic views in the general review.
The total average score was 3.28 for S4343-W and 3.45 for HAD1717MC.
The report concludes HAD1717MC images are comparable or slightly better than S4343-W images.
evidence.evidenceText: the images obtained with the HAD1717MC are comparable or slightly better than to the same view obtained from a similar patient with the S4343-W.

evidence.claim: The report states there is no difficulty evaluating a wide range of anatomic structures necessary to provide a correct conclusion.
evidence.evidenceText: There is no difficulty in evaluating a wide range of anatomic structures necessary to provide a correct conclusion.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not stated in the source text; FDA appears only in the source path or metadata signal.
Potentially conflicting objective device evidence: page 1 identifies HAD1717MC as the objective device, while another line states Objective Device: DIAMOND-series made by DRGEM Corporation.
OCR/text quality is low in multiple places, including broken words, missing letters, and inconsistent terms such as Dicom3.0/Dicom 3.0.
The source text does not provide a regulatory submission number, FDA decision status, or 510(k) number.
